select.name: supply_id
select.description: Unique identifier for each supply item

metrics.name: metric_supply_cost_total
metrics.label: Total Supply Cost
metrics.ai_hint: Use this to calculate total supply chain costs and analyze cost of goods sold (COGS)

metrics.name: metric_supply_cost_average
metrics.label: Average Supply Cost
metrics.ai_hint: Use this to understand average cost per supply item for inventory management

select.name: is_perishable
select.expr: CASE WHEN perishable = true THEN true ELSE false END

select.name: supply_category
select.expr: CASE WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%cutlery%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%fork%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%knife%' THEN 'utensils' WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%napkin%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%boat%' THEN 'packaging' WHEN perishable = true THEN 'ingredients' ELSE 'other' END
